summary: Spider-Man themed website with depth effects
architectural_notes: Website featuring Spider-Man content with depth/parallax effects
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dynamic Spider-Man hero illustration in action pose with web-slinging motion against city skyline (spiderman-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Spider-Man mask icon in comic book style with bold outlines (spiderman-icon.dim_256x256.png)
- Spider web pattern texture for background use with transparent areas (web-pattern.dim_800x800.png)
- Comic-style cityscape background with buildings in perspective for depth effect (city-background.dim_1600x900.png)

existing_features.title: Create a hero section featuring Spider-Man with parallax scrolling depth effects that create visual layers as the user scrolls
Implement content sections about Spider-Man including his origin story, powers and abilities, key villains, and notable comic/movie appearances
Apply depth effects throughout the entire website using CSS transforms, shadows, and layering to create a 3D appearance across all sections

Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by Spider-Man's iconic red and blue color scheme with comic book aesthetics, incorporating bold typography, dynamic angles, and web-pattern details throughout the layout

new_feature_requests.summary: Create Spider-Man themed website with depth effects
